title: Crumbly Caramelized Turkish Walnut Salad
description: A nutty, caramelized Turkish salad featuring warm shallots, toasted walnuts, and a sweet‑savory pomegranate molasses dressing – an egg‑free, romantic dish.

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: divided, 1 tbsp for dressing, 2 tbsp for shallots

instructions: In a dry skillet over medium heat, toss sliced shallots with 1 tbsp olive oil, a pinch of salt, and cook until caramelized, about 10–12 minutes, stirring occasionally. Set aside.
While shallots are cooking, toast walnuts in a skillet over medium heat until fragrant, about 5 minutes, stirring frequently. Set aside to cool slightly.
In a small bowl, whisk together 1 tbsp olive oil, honey, lemon juice, sumac, and pomegranate molasses until emulsified. Season with salt and pepper.
In a large mixing bowl, combine mixed greens, toasted walnuts, caramelized shallots, and toasted oat breadcrumbs.
Drizzle the dressing over the salad and toss gently to coat everything evenly.
Taste and adjust seasoning with extra salt, pepper, or lemon juice if needed.
Divide the salad onto four plates or serve as a side dish.
Garnish with a few extra walnuts or a sprinkle of sumac if desired.
